MATCH (s:Station) RETURN s.name AS stationName ORDER BY s.name LIMIT 20
MATCH (s:Station {name: 'London Paddington'})-[:HAS_PLATFORM]->(p:Platform) RETURN p.number AS platform
MATCH (t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station {code: 'PAD'}) RETURN t.id AS trainId, t.arrivalTime AS arrival
MATCH (p:Passenger {id: 42})-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) RETURN t.id, t.price
MATCH (t:Train {id: 'TRN-123'}) SET t.status = 'delayed' RETURN t.status
MATCH (i:Incident {id: 'INC-456'}) DETACH DELETE i
MATCH (r:Route)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i:Incident {status: 'active'}) RETURN r.name AS routeName, i.description
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:FOLLOWS]->(r:Route) RETURN r.name, COUNT(j) AS numJourneys ORDER BY numJourneys DESC LIMIT 10
MATCH (d:Depot)<-[:ASSIGNED_TO]-(t:Train) WHERE t.maintenanceNeeded = true RETURN d.name, COUNT(t) AS count ORDER BY count DESC
MATCH (s:StaffMember)-[:EMPLOYED_AT]->(st:Station) RETURN st.name AS station, COUNT(s) AS staffCount ORDER BY staffCount DESC
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:OWNS]->(tc:TravelCard) WHERE tc.balance < 10 RETURN p.name, tc.balance
MATCH (ml:MaintenanceLog {id: 'MLOG-789'})-[:LOGGED_FOR]->(t:Train) SET ml.status = 'completed', ml.completionDate = date() RETURN ml
MATCH (tss:TicketSalesSummary) RETURN tss.date AS salesDate, tss.totalRevenue ORDER BY salesDate DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket)-[:BOOKED_FOR]->(j:Journey) WHERE j.departureDate = date('2026-03-25') RETURN COUNT(p) AS passengersTraveling
MATCH (tr:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WHERE tr.status = 'on time' WITH tr, COUNT(s) AS stops RETURN tr.id, stops ORDER BY stops DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(t:Ticket) WITH p, COUNT(t) AS tickets WHERE tickets >= 3 RETURN p.id, tickets ORDER BY tickets DESC
MATCH (r:Route)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i:Incident) WITH r.name AS route, AVG(i.delayMinutes) AS avgDelay MATCH (j:Journey)-[:FOLLOWS]->(r) RETURN route, avgDelay, COUNT(j) AS journeys ORDER BY avgDelay DESC
MATCH (s:Station)<-[:RECORDED_AT]-(d:DailyPassengerLog) OPTIONAL MATCH (s)<-[:HAS_PLATFORM]-(p:Platform) RETURN s.name, AVG(d.passengerCount) AS avgDaily, COUNT(p) AS platforms

MATCH (t:Train)<-[:LOGGED_FOR]-(ml:MaintenanceLog) WHERE ml.status = 'pending' WITH t, COUNT(ml) AS pendingLogs WHERE pendingLogs > 2 MATCH (t)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) RETURN t.id, pendingLogs, COLLECT(s.name) AS stations

MATCH (start:Station {name: 'London'})-[*2..5]-(end:Station {name: 'Birmingham'}) WITH DISTINCT end AS station MATCH (station)<-[:RECORDED_AT]-(log:DailyPassengerLog) MATCH (pass:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(ticket:Ticket)-[:BOOKED_FOR]->(journey:Journey)-[:FOLLOWS]->(route:Route)-[:SERVES]->(station) WHERE journey.departureDate > date() WITH station.name AS stationName, SUM(log.passengerCount) AS totalLogs, COUNT(DISTINCT pass) AS uniquePassengers RETURN stationName, totalLogs, uniquePassengers ORDER BY totalLogs DESC LIMIT 10
MATCH (s:Station) RETURN s.name AS name, s.code AS code ORDER BY name LIMIT 20
MATCH (p:Platform)<-[:HAS_PLATFORM]-(s:Station {name: 'King\'s Cross'}) RETURN p.number AS platformNumber
MATCH (t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station {code: 'MAN'}) RETURN t.id AS trainId, t.arrivalTime
MATCH (pass:Passenger {id: 1001})-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket) RETURN tk.id AS ticketId, tk.price
MATCH (r:Route {name: 'West Coast Main Line'}) RETURN r.distanceKm AS distance
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:FOLLOWS]->(r:Route {name: 'East Coast Main Line'}) RETURN j.id, j.departureDate
MATCH (d:Depot)<-[:ASSIGNED_TO]-(t:Train {maintenanceNeeded: false}) RETURN d.name, COUNT(t) AS idleTrains
MATCH (sm:StaffMember {id: 567}) SET sm.status = 'on duty' RETURN sm.status
MATCH (inc:Incident {id: 'INC-2026-03'}) DETACH DELETE inc
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:OWNS]->(tc:TravelCard {balance: 5.50}) RETURN p.name, tc.id
MATCH (dpl:DailyPassengerLog {date: date('2026-03-24')})-[:RECORDED_AT]->(s:Station) RETURN s.name, dpl.passengerCount
MATCH (tss:TicketSalesSummary) WHERE tss.date > date('2026-03-01') RETURN tss.date, tss.totalRevenue ORDER BY tss.date
MATCH (ml:MaintenanceLog {status: 'pending'})-[:LOGGED_FOR]->(t:Train) SET ml.status = 'in progress' RETURN ml.id
MATCH (tk:Ticket {id: 'TKT-9999'}) DETACH DELETE tk
MATCH (inc:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route) WHERE inc.delayMinutes > 30 RETURN r.name AS affectedRoute, inc.description
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:FOLLOWS]->(r:Route) WITH r.name AS routeName, COUNT(j) AS numJourneys ORDER BY numJourneys DESC LIMIT 15 RETURN routeName, numJourneys
MATCH (t:Train)<-[:ASSIGNED_TO]-(d:Depot) WHERE t.status = 'delayed' RETURN d.name AS depotName, COUNT(t) AS delayedCount ORDER BY delayedCount DESC
MATCH (sm:StaffMember)-[:EMPLOYED_AT]->(s:Station) WHERE sm.role = 'driver' RETURN s.name, COUNT(sm) AS drivers
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:OWNS]->(tc:TravelCard) WHERE tc.expiryDate < date('2026-04-01') RETURN p.id, tc.balance
MATCH (dpl:DailyPassengerLog)-[:RECORDED_AT]->(s:Station) WITH s.name AS stationName, SUM(dpl.passengerCount) AS total ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 5 RETURN stationName, total
MATCH (t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WITH t, COUNT(DISTINCT s) AS numStops WHERE numStops > 8 RETURN t.id, numStops ORDER BY numStops DESC
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket)-[:BOOKED_FOR]->(j:Journey {departureDate: date('2026-03-26')}) RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS numTravelers
MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route) WITH r, AVG(i.delayMinutes) AS avgDelay ORDER BY avgDelay DESC LIMIT 10 RETURN r.name, avgDelay
MATCH (ml:MaintenanceLog)-[:LOGGED_FOR]->(t:Train) WHERE ml.status = 'completed' WITH t.id AS train, COUNT(ml) AS completedLogs ORDER BY completedLogs DESC LIMIT 8 RETURN train, completedLogs
MATCH (s:Station)<-[:RECORDED_AT]-(dpl:DailyPassengerLog) OPTIONAL MATCH (s)<-[:HAS_PLATFORM]-(p:Platform) RETURN s.name, AVG(dpl.passengerCount) AS avgPassengers, COUNT(p) AS numPlatforms
MATCH (tk:Ticket)-[:BOOKED_FOR]->(j:Journey)-[:FOLLOWS]->(r:Route) WITH r.name AS route, SUM(tk.price) AS totalRevenue RETURN route, totalRevenue ORDER BY totalRevenue DESC LIMIT 10
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket) WITH p, SUM(tk.price) AS totalSpent WHERE totalSpent > 300 RETURN p.name, totalSpent ORDER BY totalSpent DESC

MATCH (t:Train)<-[:LOGGED_FOR]-(ml:MaintenanceLog) WHERE ml.status = 'pending' WITH t, COUNT(ml) AS pending WHERE pending > 1 MATCH (t)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) RETURN t.id, pending, COLLECT(s.name) AS affectedStations ORDER BY pending DESC

MATCH (start:Station {name: 'Cardiff'})-[*2..5]-(end:Station {name: 'Bristol'}) WITH DISTINCT end AS station MATCH (station)<-[:RECORDED_AT]-(dpl:DailyPassengerLog) RETURN station.name, SUM(dpl.passengerCount) AS totalLogs
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket)-[:BOOKED_FOR]->(j:Journey)-[:FOLLOWS]->(r:Route)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i:Incident {status: 'active'}) RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS impactedPassengers

MATCH (s:Station)<-[:HAS_PLATFORM]-(p:Platform) WITH s, COUNT(p) AS platforms MATCH (dpl:DailyPassengerLog)-[:RECORDED_AT]->(s) WITH s.name AS name, platforms, AVG(dpl.passengerCount) AS avgDaily ORDER BY avgDaily DESC LIMIT 10 RETURN name, platforms, avgDaily
MATCH (t:Train {status: 'on time'})-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WITH s, COUNT(t) AS onTime MATCH (s)<-[:EMPLOYED_AT]-(sm:StaffMember) RETURN s.name, onTime, COUNT(sm) AS staff ORDER BY onTime DESC

MATCH (r:Route)<-[:FOLLOWS]-(j:Journey)<-[:BOOKED_FOR]-(tk:Ticket)<-[:PURCHASED]-(p:Passenger) WITH r.name AS routeName, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS uniquePassengers RETURN routeName, uniquePassengers ORDER BY uniquePassengers DESC LIMIT 15

MATCH (ml:MaintenanceLog {status: 'pending'})-[:LOGGED_FOR]->(t:Train)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(d:Depot) WITH d.name AS depot, COUNT(ml) AS pendingMaints RETURN depot, pendingMaints ORDER BY pendingMaints DESC LIMIT 5

MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route) WITH r.name AS routeName, MAX(i.delayMinutes) AS maxDelay MATCH (j:Journey)-[:FOLLOWS]->(r:Route {name: routeName}) WHERE j.departureDate >= date('2026-03-25') RETURN routeName, maxDelay, COUNT(j) AS futureJourneys ORDER BY maxDelay DESC

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:OWNS]->(tc:TravelCard) WITH p, tc MATCH (p)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket) WITH p.name AS name, tc.balance AS balance, count(tk) AS ticketCount WHERE ticketCount > 2 RETURN name, balance, ticketCount

MATCH (s:Station) OPTIONAL MATCH (s)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(t:Train {status: 'delayed'}) WITH s, COUNT(t) AS delayedTrains OPTIONAL MATCH (s)<-[:RECORDED_AT]-(dpl:DailyPassengerLog {date: date('2026-03-25')}) RETURN s.name, delayedTrains, COALESCE(dpl.passengerCount, 0) AS todayPassengers

MATCH (tss:TicketSalesSummary {date: date('2026-03-25')}) WITH tss.totalRevenue AS revenue MATCH (j:Journey {departureDate: date('2026-03-25')})-[:FOLLOWS]->(r:Route) WITH revenue, r.name AS route, COUNT(j) AS journeys RETURN revenue, route, journeys ORDER BY journeys DESC

MATCH (start:Station {name: 'Leeds'})-[*1..6]-(end:Station {name: 'Manchester'}) WITH DISTINCT end MATCH (end)<-[:RECORDED_AT]-(log:DailyPassengerLog) MATCH (pass:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(ticket:Ticket)-[:BOOKED_FOR]->(journey:Journey)-[:FOLLOWS]->(route:Route)-[:SERVES]->(end) WITH end.name AS stationName, SUM(log.passengerCount) AS totalLogs, COUNT(DISTINCT pass) AS uniquePassengers RETURN stationName, totalLogs, uniquePassengers ORDER BY totalLogs DESC LIMIT 10

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket)-[:BOOKED_FOR]->(j:Journey)-[:FOLLOWS]->(r:Route) WITH p, r, SUM(tk.price) AS spent WHERE spent > 150 MATCH (r)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i:Incident) WITH p.name AS passengerName, COLLECT(DISTINCT r.name) AS routes, AVG(i.delayMinutes) AS avgIncidentDelay RETURN passengerName, routes, avgIncidentDelay ORDER BY avgIncidentDelay DESC LIMIT 10
MATCH (s:Station) WHERE s.code STARTS WITH 'E' RETURN s.name LIMIT 15
MATCH (p:Platform)<-[:HAS_PLATFORM]-(s:Station {name: 'Euston'}) RETURN p.number AS platformNumber
MATCH (t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station {name: 'Edinburgh Waverley'}) RETURN t.id AS trainId
MATCH (pass:Passenger {id: 5678})-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket) RETURN tk.id, tk.price
MATCH (r:Route {name: 'Midland Main Line'}) RETURN r.distanceKm AS distance
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:FOLLOWS]->(r:Route {name: 'Great Western'}) RETURN j.id, j.departureDate
MATCH (d:Depot)<-[:ASSIGNED_TO]-(t:Train {status: 'maintenance'}) RETURN d.name, COUNT(t) AS trainsInDepot
MATCH (sm:StaffMember {id: 890}) SET sm.status = 'off duty' RETURN sm.status
MATCH (inc:Incident {id: 'INC-20260325'}) DETACH DELETE inc
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:OWNS]->(tc:TravelCard {balance: 2.75}) RETURN p.name, tc.id
MATCH (dpl:DailyPassengerLog {date: date('2026-03-25')})-[:RECORDED_AT]->(s:Station) RETURN s.name, dpl.passengerCount
MATCH (tss:TicketSalesSummary) WHERE tss.date = date('2026-03-25') RETURN tss.totalRevenue
MATCH (ml:MaintenanceLog {status: 'in progress'})-[:LOGGED_FOR]->(t:Train) SET ml.status = 'completed' RETURN ml.id
MATCH (tk:Ticket {id: 'TKT-ABC123'}) DETACH DELETE tk
MATCH (inc:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route) WHERE inc.delayMinutes > 60 RETURN r.name, inc.description
MATCH (j:Journey)-[:FOLLOWS]->(r:Route) WITH r.name AS routeName, COUNT(j) AS numJourneys ORDER BY numJourneys DESC LIMIT 20 RETURN routeName, numJourneys
MATCH (t:Train)<-[:ASSIGNED_TO]-(d:Depot) WHERE t.status = 'on time' RETURN d.name AS depot, COUNT(t) AS onTimeCount ORDER BY onTimeCount DESC
MATCH (sm:StaffMember)-[:EMPLOYED_AT]->(s:Station) WHERE sm.role = 'guard' RETURN s.name, COUNT(sm) AS guards
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:OWNS]->(tc:TravelCard) WHERE tc.expiryDate < date('2026-04-01') RETURN p.id, tc.balance ORDER BY tc.balance ASC
MATCH (dpl:DailyPassengerLog)-[:RECORDED_AT]->(s:Station) WITH s.name AS stationName, AVG(dpl.passengerCount) AS avgDaily ORDER BY avgDaily DESC LIMIT 8 RETURN stationName, avgDaily
MATCH (t:Train)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WITH t, COUNT(DISTINCT s) AS stops WHERE stops > 10 RETURN t.id, stops ORDER BY stops DESC LIMIT 5
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket)-[:BOOKED_FOR]->(j:Journey {departureDate: date('2026-03-26')}) RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS travelers
MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route) WITH r.name AS route, AVG(i.delayMinutes) AS avgDelay ORDER BY avgDelay DESC LIMIT 12 RETURN route, avgDelay
MATCH (ml:MaintenanceLog)-[:LOGGED_FOR]->(t:Train) WHERE ml.status = 'completed' WITH t.id AS trainId, COUNT(ml) AS logs RETURN trainId, logs ORDER BY logs DESC LIMIT 10
MATCH (s:Station)<-[:RECORDED_AT]-(dpl:DailyPassengerLog) OPTIONAL MATCH (s)<-[:HAS_PLATFORM]-(p:Platform) RETURN s.name, AVG(dpl.passengerCount) AS avg, COUNT(p) AS platforms ORDER BY avg DESC
MATCH (tk:Ticket)-[:BOOKED_FOR]->(j:Journey)-[:FOLLOWS]->(r:Route) WITH r.name AS routeName, SUM(tk.price) AS totalRev RETURN routeName, totalRev ORDER BY totalRev DESC LIMIT 15
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket) WITH p, SUM(tk.price) AS totalSpent WHERE totalSpent > 250 RETURN p.name, totalSpent ORDER BY totalSpent DESC LIMIT 10

MATCH (t:Train)<-[:LOGGED_FOR]-(ml:MaintenanceLog) WHERE ml.status = 'pending' WITH t, COUNT(ml) AS pendingLogs WHERE pendingLogs > 2 MATCH (t)-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) RETURN t.id, pendingLogs, COLLECT(s.name) AS stations ORDER BY pendingLogs DESC

MATCH (start:Station {name: 'Glasgow'})-[*2..5]-(end:Station {name: 'Inverness'}) WITH DISTINCT end AS station MATCH (station)<-[:RECORDED_AT]-(dpl:DailyPassengerLog) RETURN station.name, SUM(dpl.passengerCount) AS totalLogs
MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket)-[:BOOKED_FOR]->(j:Journey)-[:FOLLOWS]->(r:Route)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i:Incident {status: 'active'}) RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS impacted

MATCH (s:Station)<-[:HAS_PLATFORM]-(p:Platform) WITH s, COUNT(p) AS platforms MATCH (dpl:DailyPassengerLog {date: date('2026-03-25')})-[:RECORDED_AT]->(s) RETURN s.name, platforms, AVG(dpl.passengerCount) AS avgDaily ORDER BY avgDaily DESC LIMIT 10

MATCH (t:Train {status: 'on time'})-[:STOPS_AT]->(s:Station) WITH s, COUNT(t) AS onTimeTrains MATCH (s)<-[:EMPLOYED_AT]-(sm:StaffMember) RETURN s.name, onTimeTrains, COUNT(sm) AS staff ORDER BY onTimeTrains DESC

MATCH (r:Route)<-[:FOLLOWS]-(j:Journey)<-[:BOOKED_FOR]-(tk:Ticket)<-[:PURCHASED]-(p:Passenger) WITH r.name AS routeName, COUNT(DISTINCT p) AS uniquePax RETURN routeName, uniquePax ORDER BY uniquePax DESC LIMIT 20
MATCH (ml:MaintenanceLog {status: 'pending'})-[:LOGGED_FOR]->(t:Train)-[:ASSIGNED_TO]->(d:Depot) WITH d.name AS depot, COUNT(ml) AS pending RETURN depot, pending ORDER BY pending DESC LIMIT 8

MATCH (i:Incident)-[:AFFECTED]->(r:Route) WITH r.name AS routeName, MAX(i.delayMinutes) AS maxDelay MATCH (j:Journey)-[:FOLLOWS]->(r:Route {name: routeName}) WHERE j.departureDate >= date('2026-03-25') RETURN routeName, maxDelay, COUNT(j) AS journeys ORDER BY maxDelay DESC

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:OWNS]->(tc:TravelCard) WITH p, tc MATCH (p)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket) WITH p.name AS name, tc.balance AS balance, count(tk) AS countTk WHERE countTk > 3 RETURN name, balance, countTk

MATCH (s:Station) OPTIONAL MATCH (s)<-[:STOPS_AT]-(t:Train {status: 'delayed'}) WITH s, COUNT(t) AS delayed OPTIONAL MATCH (s)<-[:RECORDED_AT]-(dpl:DailyPassengerLog {date: date('2026-03-25')}) RETURN s.name, delayed, COALESCE(dpl.passengerCount, 0) AS passengers

MATCH (tss:TicketSalesSummary {date: date('2026-03-25')}) WITH tss.totalRevenue AS revenue MATCH (j:Journey {departureDate: date('2026-03-25')})-[:FOLLOWS]->(r:Route) WITH revenue, r.name AS route, COUNT(j) AS journeys RETURN revenue, route, journeys ORDER BY journeys DESC LIMIT 15

MATCH (start:Station {name: 'Bristol'})-[*1..6]-(end:Station {name: 'Cardiff'}) WITH DISTINCT end MATCH (end)<-[:RECORDED_AT]-(log:DailyPassengerLog) MATCH (pass:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(ticket:Ticket)-[:BOOKED_FOR]->(journey:Journey)-[:FOLLOWS]->(route:Route)-[:SERVES]->(end) WITH end.name AS stationName, SUM(log.passengerCount) AS totalLogs, COUNT(DISTINCT pass) AS uniquePassengers RETURN stationName, totalLogs, uniquePassengers ORDER BY totalLogs DESC LIMIT 12

MATCH (p:Passenger)-[:PURCHASED]->(tk:Ticket)-[:BOOKED_FOR]->(j:Journey)-[:FOLLOWS]->(r:Route) WITH p, r.name AS routeName, SUM(tk.price) AS spent WHERE spent > 180 MATCH (r)<-[:AFFECTED]-(i:Incident) WITH p.name AS pName, COLLECT(DISTINCT routeName) AS routesAffected, AVG(i.delayMinutes) AS avgDelay RETURN pName, routesAffected, avgDelay ORDER BY avgDelay DESC LIMIT 12
